title: Netherite Tweaks
description: Fixes issues that prevent nether ores from spawning in modded biomes.
body:
TLDR: Fixes issues where the nether ores wouldn't appear in modded nether biomes.

Netherite tweaks is intended to fix a certain problem that can appear in heavy modpacks with new nether biomes. It will also fix nether quartz & nether gold ore spawning issues as a side-effect.

This mod can also be used in absence of these biome-related issues to make it appear slightly more often on average.

The best place to find Netherite is still y=16, but it can also spawn between y=8-24

# Configuration
This mod now has configuration via the gamerules command!

### netheriteTweaksModdedBiomesFix
Enables the modded biome fix for Netherite, spawns around as often as vanilla (true by default)

### netheriteTweaksExtraNetherite
Combined with above, spawns extra netherite to make it inline with how it was in v1.1 (false by default)

### netheriteTweaksGoldModdedBiomesFix
Enables the modded biome fix for Gold, spawns around as often as vanilla (true by default)

### netheriteTweaksQuartzModdedBiomesFix
Enables the modded biome fix for Quartz, spawns around as often as vanilla (true by default)
